summary: Iteration 14 Testing COMPLETED: All 5 CMS improvements verified. Backend 24/24 tests passed. Frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/site-pages returns system pages (home, news, gallery, reading-list)
Backend: GET /api/public/site-pages returns custom nav_pages (Terms, Privacy)
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides returns all active slides
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides?page=home filters by assigned_pages
Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides?page=nonexistent returns empty list
Backend: GET /api/public/nav-pages returns list with login_required field
Backend: GET /api/public/nav-pages returns list with open_in_new_tab field
Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123! returns token
Backend: Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/hero-slides returns list
Backend: POST /api/admin/hero-slides creates slide with assigned_pages array
Backend: PUT /api/admin/hero-slides/{id} updates assigned_pages
Backend: GET /api/admin/nav-pages returns list
Backend: POST /api/admin/nav-pages with page_type syncs to pages collection
Backend: PUT /api/admin/nav-pages/{id} syncs updated content to pages collection
Backend: GET /api/public/page/terms returns page content
Backend: GET /api/public/page/privacy returns page content
Backend: GET /api/public/page/nonexistent returns default structure
Backend: GET /api/public/hero returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/about returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/services returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/sections returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/testimonials returns 200
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero section
Frontend: Login Required screen shown on /terms for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Login Required screen has 'Login to Continue' button
Frontend: After login, /terms page content loads correctly
Frontend: Admin Pages Manager has Custom Pages tab
Frontend: Admin Pages Manager has System Pages tab
Frontend: System Pages tab shows Home, News, Gallery, Reading List
Frontend: Custom Pages tab shows Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Frontend: Hero Slide Form has Page Assignment section
Frontend: Page Assignment shows checkboxes for home, news, gallery, reading-list
Frontend: Page Assignment shows checkboxes for custom pages (Terms, Privacy)
Frontend: Footer Terms link has target='_blank' (Open in New Tab working)
Frontend: Footer Privacy link does NOT have target='_blank' (correct)
Frontend: Homepage shows legacy hero fallback when no slides assigned to 'home'
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed slides and pages during CRUD testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified 5 CMS improvements: (1) Hero slides now have 'assigned_pages' array - public endpoint accepts ?page=X to filter. Existing slides have empty assigned_pages, so homepage shows legacy hero fallback. (2) nav_pages with page_type sync content to 'pages' collection via _sync_page_type function. (3) PageProtectedRoute in App.js checks login_required before rendering /terms, /privacy, /page/:pageId - shows 'Login Required' screen for unauthenticated users. (4) Navbar and Footer use <a target='_blank'> for links with open_in_new_tab=true. (5) PagesManager has tabs for Custom Pages (Terms, Privacy) and System Pages (Home, News, Gallery, Reading List). Current nav_pages: Terms (login_required=true, open_in_new_tab=true), Privacy (login_required=false).

hero_per_page_assignment.admin_form: Page Assignment checklist with all site pages
hero_per_page_assignment.fallback: Legacy hero shown when no slides assigned to page

pages_content_dynamic.syncs_to: pages collection when nav_page has page_type

pages_manager_tabs.system_tab: Shows Home, News, Gallery, Reading List
